name: Carson Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table Glossy White - Christopher Knight Home
description: The Christopher Knight Home Carson Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table offers a clear late 60's vibe to any room it is placed in. This coffee table has a high gloss white finish that will make a statement to any living room or family room. With a rotating top and extra storage underneath this table is multifunctional and unique. Make a statement in your home with the Christopher Knight Home Carson Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table . A purchase you will enjoy for years to come.
